author: ckep1
description: Allows one audio track to be played at a time, pausing or stopping any others.

manifest.author: Chris Kephart
manifest.description: Keeps one audio stream active by pausing others, with an optional reset to start.
manifest.name: AutoPause

name: AutoPause

releases.author: ckep1
releases.description:
## 1.1.1

- Fixed audio not pausing across tabs when new audio is played
- Fixed next/previous commands jumping to wrong audio after using play/pause toggle
- Fixed toggle hotkey not resuming audio that was paused via native player controls
- Fixed event listener leak when focus prevention was applied repeatedly
- Removed redundant code and unused methods

releases.author: ckep1
releases.description:
Introduces Hotkeys (unbound by default):
- Next track on current tab
- Previous track on current tab
- Play / pause any playing audio in Obsidian

Also removes some dead code.

Thanks to @ShreyaPatibanda for the issue with the feature idea that was adapted.

releases.author: ckep1
releases.description: Minor code improvement based on Obsidian reviewer comment.

releases.author: ckep1
releases.description: The initial release of this plugin.
